title: Weekly Market Report — Week of Apr 10, 2025
summary: 28/67 themes advanced (-1.85% avg). Tariff uncertainty drove risk-off. Defensive domestic themes outperformed.
report:
## Market Overview (Week of Apr 7–11, 2025)

Highly volatile week. 28 of 67 themes advanced, average return -1.85%. US tariff announcement uncertainty and yen appreciation (145–147) drove broad risk-off selling.

---

## Rising Themes

Defensive domestic themes outperformed: Food & Beverage (+2.1%), Healthcare (+1.8%), Telecom (+1.2%).

## Falling Themes

EV (-6.2%) and export-oriented sectors saw sharpest declines on tariff and yen concerns.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Tariff volatility confirms which themes are truly domestic-demand driven vs export-dependent. Defense, Infrastructure, Inbound Tourism showed resilience — confirming non-correlation with global risk events.
